creator: brian@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

When mergemaster is run, the merge option should be used to simply 
merge the $FreeBSD$ Id line into your existing /etc/ppp/ppp.conf. 

This is much the same for most files under /etc. 

Having said that, if someone were to supply patches to make ppp 
understand a -conf switch (usable only by root), I'd have no 
problem with integrating them into the sources.
